31 Brandon Beamon

Summary

Biography

2025-26: Played in one game ... Recorded his first career points against Wilmington (2/14/26) ... Scored two points and grabbed one rebound

PERSONAL/HIGH SCHOOL: Currently majoring in Sports Management ... Featured in the CT Insider and Rep. AM ... Graduated from Wilby High School
No stats available for the current season.
